/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_publisher.dir/publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_publisher.dir/HelloWorldData.cpp.o -o ../../bin/test_publisher   -L/workspace/repo/sdk/repository/unitree_sdk2-main/thirdparty/lib/aarch64  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/repo/sdk/repository/unitree_sdk2-main/thirdparty/lib/aarch64 /workspace/repo/sdk/repository/unitree_sdk2-main/lib/aarch64/libunitree_sdk2.a -lddsc -lddscxx
